rules: Avoid Inter, Syne, Roboto for headings
Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em])
Max hero heading size: text-6xl. Use fluid scaling.

layout_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4 to p-8 for containers. Tight gaps (gap-4) for data widgets.
layout_spacing.border_radius: Max 4px or rounded-sm to maintain technical rigidity. No pill shapes.
layout_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for data and forms. Optical alignment over mathematical.

surfaces_and_components.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders strategy. 1px solid border (border-border), zero shadow. On hover: -translate-y-1, subtle shadow-sm.
surfaces_and_components.header: Solid white background with hard 1px bottom border. No glassmorphism here for data fidelity.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-sm), high contrast active states. Must have explicit focus/hover states.
surfaces_and_components.data_visualization: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Use risk level colors for status. Provide clear tooltips without large shadows.

motion.hover_states: Crisp, fast transitions. No sluggish animations.
motion.page_transitions: Minimal. Focus on data loading states (skeletons) rather than elaborate entry animations.

accessibility.contrast: APCA/WCAG AA strictly enforced. Focus rings must be high contrast (ring-blue-600).
accessibility.data_testid: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

icons.rationale: Perfect for dense dashboards and developer/finance tools.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT introduce teal or purple.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for Landing Page. Use Shadcn components heavily customized for the Dashboard.
Implement 'Grid Borders' look for dashboard widgets: flat, rigid, defined by 1px borders.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Stick to Chivo.
Ensure all buttons, inputs, and key data points have appropriate `data-testid` attributes.
